parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: When enabled, will actively spatialize the audio input.

parameters.name: headobject
parameters.label: Head Object COMP
parameters.description: A that represents the listener's (ie. head) transform. Must be a that contains transform data, such as a Geometry or Camera .

parameters.name: sourceobject
parameters.label: Source Object COMP
parameters.description: A that represents the audio source's transform. Must be a that contains transform data, such as a Geometry or Camera .

parameters.name: minrange
parameters.label: Minimum Range
parameters.description: The minimum attenuation range of the audio source (in meters).

parameters.name: maxrange
parameters.label: Maximum Range
parameters.description: The maximum attenuation range of the audio source (in meters)

parameters.name: diameter
parameters.label: Diameter
parameters.description: The virtual diameter of the audio source. By default the diameter is 0 which means the audio source is just a point in space.

parameters.name: bandhint
parameters.label: Band Hint
parameters.description: If the audio source content is known, this parameter can be set to improve overall sound quality.

parameters.name: reflectrevert
parameters.label: Reflections and Reverb
parameters.description: When enabled, audio reflection and reverb will be enabled.

parameters.name: attenuation
parameters.label: Attenuation
parameters.description: Select attentuation calculation between the audio source and listener (head).

parameters.name: attenuationscale
parameters.label: Attenuation Scale
parameters.description: Set the fixed attenuation value when in Fixed Attenuation mode.

parameters.name: boxroommode
parameters.label: Box Room Mode
parameters.description: Enables box room calculations for reverberation.

parameters.name: roomleftrelfect
parameters.label: Room Left Reflect
parameters.description: Reflection level for the left of the box (ie. what percentage of the audio is reflected back).

parameters.name: roomrightrelfect
parameters.label: Room Right Reflect
parameters.description: Reflection level for the right of the box (ie. what percentage of the audio is reflected back).

parameters.name: roombottomrelfect
parameters.label: Room Bottom Reflect
parameters.description: Reflection level for the bottom of the box (ie. what percentage of the audio is reflected back).

parameters.name: roomtoprelfect
parameters.label: Room Top Reflect
parameters.description: Reflection level for the top of the box (ie. what percentage of the audio is reflected back).

parameters.name: roomfrontrelfect
parameters.label: Room Front Reflect
parameters.description: Reflection level for the front of the box (ie. what percentage of the audio is reflected back).

parameters.name: roombackrelfect
parameters.label: Room Back Reflect
parameters.description: Reflection level for the back of the box (ie. what percentage of the audio is reflected back).

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).

parameters.name: roomsizez
parameters.label: Roomsizez
parameters.description: Sets the size of the box room.
